rationale: Educ. Code §49.009 governs tax abatement agreements in school district consolidations. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no direct conflict arises from increasing the exemption amount.
quote: The commissioner shall determine the local revenue of a school district under this chapter as if any tax abatement agreement executed by a school district on or after May 31, 1993, had not been executed.
_note: No direct statutory linkage between §49.009 (tax abatements) and Tax Code §11.13(b) (homestead exemption). Indirect fiscal interaction possible via local revenue determinations but not a textual conflict.
